LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER LAWRENCE GOLDFARB'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE TO PERMIT INSPECTION AND COPYING OF RECORDS AND POSTPONEMENT OF ANY SHAREHOLDERS MEETING. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077 ---------------------------------------------------------------- AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT DENIES THE PETITION TO COMPEL INSPECTION/COPYING OF RECORDS AND POSTPONEMENT OF SHAREHOLDER MEETINGS WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR PETITIONER TO RENEW THE REQUEST AFTER THE COURT DECIDES ON THE MOTION TO REMOVE PETITIONER AS DIRECTOR. RESPONDENT HAS PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SHOW THAT PETITIONER IS MAKING THIS REQUEST TO FURTHER PETITIONER'S EXTRANEOUS INTERESTS AND CONSIDERATIONS AND NOT NECESSARILY IN THE BEST INTEREST OF THE CORPORATION. FURTHER, RESPONDENT HAS RAISED SUFFICIENT CONCERNS AS TO HOW PETITIONER ACQUIRED HIS DIRECTORSHIP (IE - FRAUD). FOR THESE REASONS, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PETITIONER'S REQUEST SHOULD BE DENIED. PARTIES CALLED AND NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S RULING ON MAY 31, 2011. MR. CARLIN TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.

DISCOVERY 302, DISCOVERY 302, RESPONDENTS CHRISTOPHER SMITH, PYRAMID INTERACTIVE INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 17, 2011 (UNDER LEAD CASE #CGC-11-509208) TO BE HEARD AFTER THE PARTIES ATTEND MEDIATION. FURTHER, THE COURT CONTINUED THE FOLLOWING MATTERS (UNDER LEAD CASE #CGC-11-509208) TO AUGUST 17, 2011 TO BE HEARD WITH THIS MOTION: GOLDFARB'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY DAVID GIVEN AND PHILLIPS, ERLEWINE & GIVEN, LLP AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS (CURRENTLY SET FOR JULY 8, 2011); GOLDFARB'S MOTION TO COMPEL DAVID GIVEN TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS, AND GOLDFARB'S MOTION TO COMPEL CHRISTOPHER SMITH TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS (BOTH CURRENTLY SET FOR JULY 19, 2011). JUDGE LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Depositions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS CHRISTOPHER SMITH, PYRAMID INTERACTIVE INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.
Appearances: Timothy M. Wong of Collette Erickson Farmer & O'Neill, LLP (788.4646) for the Goldfarb defendants; Nicholas A. Carlin of Phillips Erlewine & Given LLP (398.0900) for Pyramid Interactive. No other appearances.
Discussed and the court continued the matter to August 17, 2011 (under lead case #CGC-11-509208) to be heard after the parties attend mediation. Further, the court continued the following matters (under lead case #CGC-11-509208) to August 17, 2011 to be heard with this motion: Goldfarb's motion to disqualify David Given and Phillips, Erlewine & Given, LLP and to stay proceedings (currently set for July 8, 2011); Goldfarb's motion to compel David Given to appear at deposition and produce documents, and Goldfarb's motion to compel Christopher Smith to appear at deposition and produce documents (both currently set for July 19, 2011). (302/LMG) Judge Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Actions
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PYRAMID INTERACTIVE INC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS (CPF-11-511264 with CGC-11-509208).
Appearances: Nicholas A. Carlin of Phillips Erlewine & Given LLP (398.0900) for Pyramid Interactive, Inc; Rod Divelbiss of Collette Erickson Farmer & O'Neill (788.4646) for Lawrence Goldfarb.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate To Permit Inspection And Copying Of Records And Postponement Of Any Shareholders Meeting; Points And Authorities, Declarations Of Lawrence Goldfarb, Rod Divelbissand Ceritificate Of Service
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER LAWRENCE GOLDFARB'S MOTION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF MANDATE TO PERMIT INSPECTION AND COPYING OF RECORDS AND POSTPONEMENT OF ANY SHAREHOLDERS MEETING.
Appearances: Nicholas A. Carlin of Phillips Erlewine & Given LLP (398.0900) for Pyramid Interactive, Inc; Rod Divelbiss of Collette Erickson Farmer & O'Neill (788.4646) for Lawrence Goldfarb.
No other appearances. Argued and the court took the matter under submission. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
After the hearing, the court ruled as follows: The court denies the petition to compel inspection/copying of records and postponement of shareholder meetings without prejudice for petitioner to renew the request after the court decides on the motion to remove petitioner as Director.
Respondent has presented sufficient evidence to show that petitioner is making this request to further petitioner's extraneous interests and considerations and not necessarily in the best interest of the corporation.
Further, respondent has raised sufficient concerns as to how petitioner acquired his Directorship (ie - Fraud).
For these reasons, the Court determines that petitioner's request should be denied.

Parties called and notified of the court's ruling on May 31, 2011. Mr. Carlin to submit a proposed form of order.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate To Permit Inspection And Copying Of Records And Postponement Of Any Shareholders Meeting; Points And Authorities, Declarations Of Lawrence Goldfarb, Rod Divelbissand Ceritificate Of Service
